1999January 18, 1999

🇺🇸 San Francisco, CA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, San Francisco, United States, January 18, 1999 -- January 28, 1999

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1999-01-san-francisco-ca-usa

16 Resolutions

404Plenary
Thank US PRO and Chuck Stark for hosting SC 4 meeting in San Francisco
SC 4 wishes to thank US PRO, Chuck Stark and his tireless support staff for their quality services and generous hospitality in hosting the SC 4/WGs meeting 1999-01-25/29.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
403Plenary
Develop procedures to ensure EXPRESS models conform to ISO 10303-11
SC 4 directs the Quality Committee and WG 11 to develop procedures to ensure that EXPRESS models in SC 4 standards conform to the requirements of ISO 10303-11 and to the guidelines for EXPRESS usag...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
402Plenary
Revise methods documents to allow use of SC 4 standards as Common Resources
SC 4 requests QC to revise the SC 4 methods documents to allow the use of parts of other ISO/TC 184/ SC 4 standards as Common Resources in the development of STEP Application Interpreted Models, an...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
401Plenary
Cancel project 10303-229/329 as NWI and approve as PWI
SC 4 cancels SC 4 project 10303-229/329 as New Work Item: "Application protocol: Exchange of design and manufacturing product information for forged parts"; but in recognition of the initiative's c...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
400Plenary
Remove projects 10303-208/308 and 10303-222/322 from Release 2.0
SC 4 resolves to remove the following AP projects and their associated Abstract test suites from ISO 10303 release 2.0: * 10303-208/308 - Application Protocol: Lifecycle management - Change process...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
399Plenary
Cancel projects 10303-222 and 10303-322 for composites
SC 4 resolves to cancel the following projects: * 10303-222 - Application Protocol: Exchange of product data for composites * 10303-322 - Abstract Test Suite: Exchange of product data for composites
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
398Plenary
Request ISO/TC 184 and ISO CS to provide a Technical Officer
SC 4 requests ISO/TC 184 and the ISO CS to take the necessary steps to provide ISO/TC 184 with a Technical Officer from the ISO staff.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
397Plenary
Accept A-liaison of IEC/TC 93 on JWG 9
SC 4 accepts the A-liaison of IEC/TC 93 on JWG 9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
396Plenary
Modify SC 4 Handbook Section 5.7.3 to include A-liaisons
SC 4 requests its Secretary to modify section 5.7.3 of the SC 4 Handbook to include A-liaisons in the list of organizations and individuals permitted to submit resolutions to SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
395Plenary
Establish Category A two-way liaison with Object Management Group
SC 4 requests a Category A active two-way liaison with the Object Management Group, and requests that the SC 4 Secretary confirm this liaison with the ISO Central Secretariat.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
394Plenary
Allow nominated STEP projects to adopt modular approach
SC 4 resolves to allow nominated STEP projects to adopt the modular approach as defined in the following deliverables of the WG 10 STEP Modularization PWI: 1. WG 10 N221 Guidelines for the content ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
393Plenary
Adopt SC 4N777 as strategic plan
SC 4 adopts SC 4N777 as its strategic plan and requests the Secretariat to publish the document on SOLIS, and forward it to the ISO/TC 184 Secretariat.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
392Plenary
Amend SC 4 Organization Handbook to permit discussion of position papers
SC 4 approves the following amendment to the Organisation Handbook to permit the discussion of position papers at SC 4 meetings (changes highlighted): 5.7.1 Calling an SC 4 Meeting SC 4 meeting dat...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
391Plenary
Amend SC 4 Organization Handbook procedures for handbook changes
SC 4 amends the approval procedure for changes as follows (changes highlighted): 5.7.5.2 Approval of the Minutes and Handbook Changes of the Preceding Meeting Approval of the minutes of the precedi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
390Plenary
Direct Secretariat to provide ballot documents in electronic format
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to provide SC 4 ballot documents to P-members, O-members and A-liaisons in electronic format as follows: * SC 4 ballot documents will be made available on SOLIS in thei...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
389Plenary
Approve new project leaders and project editors
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== | ISO Project # | Project Lead | Document Editor | 10303-208 | Janice Chinn, Tim Turner | J...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
